title: erigeron canus
intro: Erigeron canus, also known as the poorman's skyflower or Canadian fleabane, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the arctic tundra regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. Consuming Erigeron canus has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Erigeron canus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to treat wounds and skin irritations.
